news_items.headline: Aaron Judge's rib injury a saga that culminated with Yankees expecting him to return this season
news_items.summary: Aaron Judge has a stress fracture in his top right rib and will undergo imaging on the area in four to six weeks. Yet, nothing about the way the Yankees came to this conclusion was simple or straightforward.

news_items.headline: Royals at Twins, June 5, 7:15 CT

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Cincinnati Reds Friday Night
news_items.summary: After a much-needed day off, the St. Louis Cardinals open another home series Friday night versus the Cincinnati Reds. Kyle Leahy will make the start for the Cardinals while the Reds are scheduled to send Brady Singer to the mound. First pitch scheduled for 7:15pm central time at Busch Stadium. Broadcast being handled by Cardinals.tv. […]

news_items.headline: Laureano likely to miss remainder of season after hip surgery
Colorado Rockies vs. Milwaukee Brewers game thread: Brandon Sproat vs. Ryan Feltner
news_items.summary: The Colorado Rockies are coming off back-to-back series wins against bad teams — now they get a much tougher test against the first-place Brew Crew.

news_items.headline: Altuve Returns! Astros vs. Athletics Game Discussion: 6/5/2026
news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: The Houston Astros (28-36) will continue their nine-game homestand tonight as they open a three-game series against the Athletics (30-32) at Daikin Park. RHP Peter Lambert (4-4, 3.77 ERA) will make his ninth start of the year for the Astros tonight opposite the A’s and RHP Jack Perkins (2-2, 5.46 ERA), who’s making […]
